picks.quote: I think fighters who are going to get over on Kyle Bochniak are either going to be very sharp or very quick... I think Reinier de Ridder is neither.
We're going to see Jesus Aguilar jump on a guillotine and his arms are so short that he can't scratch the top of his head.
40-year-old Kevin Spacey, Nurgush has got the tenacity of a bowl of oatmeal.
